title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 02 2026
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 02 2026
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report February 02 2026
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 02/02/2026
Today, the DCE iron ore market exhibited a volatile and downward trend. The benchmark contract, I2605,eventually closed at 783 RMB/tonne, representing a decline of 1.26% from the previous trading day. In the physical market, spot prices dropped by 5-8 RMB/tonne compared to the prior session.
